# Claude Code Manager

> Free, open-source VS Code extension that puts every Claude Code session, account, MCP server, skill, slash command, hook, and agent into one sidebar. 100% local, zero telemetry. Works in VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Antigravity, VSCodium, Codespaces, and Gitpod.

Claude Code Manager reads the shared `~/.claude/` directory used by Claude Code (both the CLI and the official VS Code extension) and turns it into a clickable, searchable sidebar. It is an all-in-one alternative to running separate single-purpose tools: a Claude Code usage tracker (in the spirit of ccusage), a multi-account switcher (like claude-swap), and an MCP server manager all live in the same sidebar. It makes no network calls at all, collects no analytics, and stores no credentials. Even the opt-in Quota card stays fully local: the 5-hour and 7-day numbers are computed by Claude Code and shown in its statusline, and a tap caches that render to a local file the extension reads. It never calls Anthropic and never touches your OAuth token. Licensed Apache 2.0.

## Features

- Sessions: browse, search (full-text transcript), and resume past Claude Code sessions by project and git branch. Pin, rename, fork, import, export, and restore a whole workspace of terminals. Active sessions show live status.
- Account & Usage: switch between Claude accounts without a full logout/login. Activity heatmap, token usage by model/project/tool, and opt-in quota bars for the real 5-hour and 7-day subscription windows.
- MCP Servers: enable, disable, delete, or inspect MCP servers with no JSON editing. Secrets are masked; an auth-health banner flags connectors that need re-auth.
- Skills, Commands, Hooks, Agents: manage global, project, and plugin-scoped skills; built-in and custom slash commands; automation hooks across every settings scope with full command preview; project and plugin agents with model badges.
- Config: model selector, reasoning effort, per-scope permissions editor, settings-history snapshots with one-click restore, and brain backup/restore.

## Links

- [Install on VS Code Marketplace](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=vishalguptax.claude-manager): primary install for VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Antigravity
- [Install on Open VSX](https://open-vsx.org/extension/vishalguptax/claude-manager): for VSCodium, Theia, Gitpod
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/vishalguptax/claude-code-manager): source code, issues, changelog (Apache 2.0)
- [Sponsor the project](https://github.com/sponsors/vishalguptax)

## Guides

- [Claude Code session manager](https://claudecodemanager.vishalg.in/sessions/): search, resume, fork, and move sessions between machines
- [Claude Code usage tracker](https://claudecodemanager.vishalg.in/usage/): tokens by model/project/tool and real 5-hour / 7-day quota
- [Claude account switcher](https://claudecodemanager.vishalg.in/accounts/): swap logins without /logout /login
- [Claude Code MCP manager](https://claudecodemanager.vishalg.in/mcp/): toggle and inspect MCP servers without JSON editing
- [Claude Code skills manager](https://claudecodemanager.vishalg.in/skills/): browse global, project, and plugin skills by scope
- [Claude Code slash commands manager](https://claudecodemanager.vishalg.in/commands/): browse and run built-in and custom commands
- [Claude Code hooks manager](https://claudecodemanager.vishalg.in/hooks/): every automation hook by scope with full command preview
- [Claude Code agents manager](https://claudecodemanager.vishalg.in/agents/): browse project and plugin subagents with model badges
